testcase.name: shouldFailTheCreateNewKeyBecauseIdempotencyMissed
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-03T17:07:25.888-03:00 INFO 167470 --- [demo] [ main] c.w.a.i.c.s.config.SecurityFilter : User 'superadm@gmail.com' authenticated successfully. 2026-06-03T17:07:25.889-03:00 WARN 167470 --- [demo] [ main] .w.s.m.s.DefaultHandlerExceptionResolver : Resolved [org.springframework.web.bind.MissingRequestHeaderException: Required request header 'X-Idempotency-Key' for method parameter type String is not present]
